action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 9 trained a DKT model on synthetic data (val_auc 0.6081). Real data still missing; we inadvertently wrote to /data, possibly blocking future mount. Need to investigate /proc/mounts, config.json, experiment.log, and search for any potential data files (not just .pt) to see if real dataset is available. Also must submit eval immediately to get baseline timing and validate the predict pipeline before finalizing approach.
